update_rules.tier_1: frozen; owner sign-off required for any edit
update_rules.tier_2: may grow with the commercial catalogue

_meta.note: Permanent identity-resolution regression corpus. EXPECTED ANSWERS ARE AUTHORED BY OWNER + EXTERNAL REVIEW (6C) — never by tooling. This file ships with EMPTY tiers: structure + validation only. Locked identity_status: resolved | ambiguous | unrecognised | missing_species | genus_level | policy_dependent. Two enforced rules: (1) a policy_dependent entry MUST be a test FAILURE if the resolver returns a confident answer — never skipped; (2) every policy_dependent entry carries resolver_behaviour_on_undecided (expected: ambiguous with candidates, never a pick). Validate with knowledge/identity/validate_reference_corpus.mjs against identity_reference_corpus.schema.json.
